sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text_column VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_column) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_strings SET text_column = string_split(text_column, ' ') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, string_split(text_column, ' ') AS split_text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT string_split('duckdb is great', ' ') AS split_text;
